mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(member_group_auth_log_idx),0)+1 FROM MEMBER_GROUP_AUTH_LOG
INSERT INTO MEMBER_GROUP_AUTH_LOG ( member_group_auth_log_idx, member_id, add_date, add_ip, mod_id, authGroupIdxList, authGroupIdxModList ) VALUES ( #{member_group_auth_log_idx}, #{member_id}, SYSDATE, #{add_ip}, #{mod_id}, #{authGroupIdxList}, #{authGroupIdxModList} )
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER_GROUP_AUTH_LOG WHERE 1=1
AND ${search_type} LIKE '%' || #{search_text} || '%'
AND add_date >= to_date(#{start_date},'yyyy-mm-dd')
AND add_date <= to_date(#{end_date},'yyyy-mm-dd')+1

${pagingTop} SELECT member_group_auth_log_idx, member_id, TO_CHAR(ADD_DATE, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mm:ss') AS ADD_DATE, add_ip, mod_id, authGroupIdxList, authGroupIdxModList FROM MEMBER_GROUP_AUTH_LOG WHERE 1=1
AND ${search_type} LIKE '%' || #{search_text} || '%'
AND add_date >= to_date(#{start_date},'yyyy-mm-dd')
AND add_date <= to_date(#{end_date},'yyyy-mm-dd')+1
ORDER BY member_group_auth_log_idx DESC ${pagingBottom}

SELECT member_group_auth_log_idx, member_id, TO_CHAR(ADD_DATE, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mm:ss') AS ADD_DATE, add_ip, mod_id, authGroupIdxList, authGroupIdxModList FROM MEMBER_GROUP_AUTH_LOG WHERE 1=1
AND ${search_type} LIKE '%' || #{search_text} || '%'
AND add_date >= to_date(#{start_date},'yyyy-mm-dd')
AND add_date <= to_date(#{end_date},'yyyy-mm-dd')+1
ORDER BY member_group_auth_log_idx DESC
